全球速卖通关于禁止销售含Nitrous Oxide商品的公告

发布日期：北京时间2019/9/5

亲爱的速卖通卖家：

依据中国 《危险化学品安全管理条例》 、危险化学品目录（2015版）的相关规定，速卖通平台禁止销售含Nitrous Oxide 商品。即日起到9月30日（清理期时间），请所有卖家对店铺内商品进行自检自查，立即停止销售并删除相关商品。自10月1日起，平台将对此类商品进行删除及扣分处置（每次2分）；情节严重的，平台有权进行账号冻结或关闭。

全球速卖通

- - -

全球速卖通关于禁止向比利时销售食物垃圾处理器的合规公告

发布日期：北京时间2023/5/30

**尊敬的速卖通商家：**

根据比利时皇家法令要求，为保护环境及公众健康，禁止在比利时市场销售可将废弃物排入污水处理系统的食物垃圾处理设备。全球速卖通始终致力于保证平台商品符合国内外相关法律法规规定，保障平台用户权益，考虑当地法律要求，平台对比利时市场禁售食物垃圾处理器。

【商品管控范围】
--------

食物垃圾处理器（kitchen food waste grinders/food waste disposers/ kitchen residue garbage processors）：指无论是否需要同其他设备结合使用，目的在于研磨固体残留物最终排放到水生环境或水收集和废水处理系统中的相关设备。

【管控措施】
------

**全球速卖通禁止商家向比利时销售食物垃圾处理器，**若发现上述违规商品，平台将按照全球速卖通平台禁限售规则执行对应国家屏蔽。

平台提醒广大商家合规发品及合规交易，商家有责任遵守任何本国及销售目的国适用的产品合规法律，发布违规产品及信息的商家，平台将依照相关平台规则进行处罚。对恶意绕过规则、在任何场景（如沟通、直播等交互场景）发布违规信息、重复违规、被监管部门通告、被重要媒体曝光以及存在其他严重违规情节的会员，依据平台相关规则，平台将采取包括但不限于对相关产品及信息执行对应国家屏蔽、删除产品信息、扣分、屏蔽店铺、限制使用网站产品功能、冻结账号直至关闭账号的处罚。

【参考依据】
------

Art 2 §1 of the Belgian Royal Decree of August 10, 2015

注意：以上信息仅供参考，不保证完整性、准确性、及时性，AliExpress保留对此内容修改、补充的权利。

感谢您对全球速卖通的关注和支持！

**全球速卖通**

AliExpress Ban on kitchen food waste grinders sold to Belgium
=============================================================

**Dear sellers**

AliExpress is always committed to maintaining an orderly marketplace in compliance with all local laws, regulations and providing consumers with safe and high-quality goods. According to Art 2 §1 of the Belgian Royal Decree of August 10, 2015，**AliExpress prohibits the sale of such products to Belgium market.**

\[Prohibited Products\]
-----------------------

Grinders whose grinding is intended to be disposed of through wastewater disposal systems, including any equipment or component, whether integrated into another equipment or not, whose purpose is to grind solid residues for ultimate discharge into aquatic environments or into a water collection and treatment network.

Prohibited products include but are not limited to the following types:

Kitchen food waste grinders/ food waste disposers /kitchen residue garbage processors

\[Control measures\]
--------------------

**AliExpress prohibits the sale of kitchen food waste grinders to Belgium market.**

AliExpress members shall list and sell products in accordance with applicable rules and abide by applicable laws and regulations of any country of origin and any country of destination. Where any member is found to be listing products or releasing information in violation of the rules, AliExpress will delist or delete the related products or information and punish the violator in accordance with relevant rules. For a member that knowingly circumvents the rules, provides information about prohibited products in any interaction scenarios (e.g., chats, live-streaming), violates the rules repeatedly, is criticized in any form of media circulated by a regulator, receives negative publicity published by media, or commits any other serious violation, AliExpress will impose penalties, including but not limited to deleting product information, deducting points, blocking stores, restricting access to the website's product features, and freezing or even closing the account, in accordance with the platform's relevant rules.

\[References\]
--------------

Art 2 §1 of the Belgian Royal Decree of August 10, 2015

Note: The above information does not constitute any legal advice and shall not be deemed or represent the legal opinion or conclusion of the regulatory body. Further, we do not undertake or warrant that the information represents the latest laws and regulations. For specific information, please consult the competent authority, law firms, or third-party certification/testing/consulting companies in the target country or region.

AliExpress.com will continue to monitor the changes in laws and related policies of countries worldwide, and adjust our platform rules accordingly.

Thank you for your support and attention.

**AliExpress**

- - -

全球速卖通关于禁止向德国销售闪光功能自行车车灯的商家通知

发布日期：北京时间2023/6/21

**尊敬的速卖通商家：**

全球速卖通始终致力于保证平台商品符合国内外相关法律法规规定，保障平台用户权益，基于德国当地法律规定,全球速卖通禁止商家向德国销售带闪光或闪烁模式的自行车车灯。

【商品管控范围】
--------

管控带闪光或闪烁模式的自行车车灯（包括自行车尾灯），自行车灯光束必须恒定且无任何闪光或闪烁模式，以免分散其他道路使用者的注意力。

【管控措施】
------

**全球速卖通禁止商家向德国销售带闪光功能的自行车车灯，**若发现上述违规商品，平台将按照全球速卖通平台禁限售规则执行对应国家屏蔽。

平台提醒广大商家合规发品及合规交易，商家有责任遵守任何本国及销售目的国适用的产品合规法律，发布违规产品及信息的商家，平台将依照相关平台规则进行处罚。对恶意绕过规则、在任何场景（如沟通、直播等交互场景）发布违规信息、重复违规、被监管部门通告、被重要媒体曝光以及存在其他严重违规情节的会员，依据平台相关规则，平台将采取包括但不限于对相关产品及信息执行对应国家屏蔽、删除产品信息、扣分、屏蔽店铺、限制使用网站产品功能、冻结账号直至关闭账号的处罚。

【参考依据】
------

Section 67 (Lighting equipment on bicycles) of the “Straßenverkehrs Zulassungs Ordnung” (StVZO; Road Traffic Licensing Regulations)

注意：以上信息仅供参考，不保证完整性、准确性、及时性，AliExpress保留对此内容修改、补充的权利。

感谢您对全球速卖通的关注和支持！

  

**全球速卖通**

  

  

**AliExpress Ban on bicycle lights with flashing patterns on Germany**

**Dear sellers**

AliExpress is always committed to maintaining an orderly marketplace in compliance with all local laws, regulations and providing consumers with safe and high-quality goods. According to Section 67 (Lighting equipment on bicycles) of the “Straßenverkehrs Zulassungs Ordnung” (StVZO; Road Traffic Licensing Regulations)，**AliExpress prohibits the sale of such products to Germany market.**

\[Prohibited Products\]
-----------------------

Bicycle lights（including bicycle tail lights）with flashing or blinking patterns.

\[Control measures\]
--------------------

**AliExpress prohibits the sale of Bicycle lights****（****including bicycle tail lights****）****with flashing or blinking patterns to Germany market.**

AliExpress members shall list and sell products in accordance with applicable rules and abide by applicable laws and regulations of any country of origin and any country of destination. Where any member is found to be listing products or releasing information in violation of the rules, AliExpress will delist or delete the related products or information and punish the violator in accordance with relevant rules. For a member that knowingly circumvents the rules, provides information about prohibited products in any interaction scenarios (e.g., chats, live-streaming), violates the rules repeatedly, is criticized in any form of media circulated by a regulator, receives negative publicity published by media, or commits any other serious violation, AliExpress will impose penalties, including but not limited to deleting product information, deducting points, blocking stores, restricting access to the website's product features, and freezing or even closing the account, in accordance with the platform's relevant rules.

\[References\]
--------------

According to Section 67 (Lighting equipment on bicycles) of the “Straßenverkehrs Zulassungs Ordnung” (StVZO; Road Traffic Licensing Regulations)

Note: The above information does not constitute any legal advice and shall not be deemed or represent the legal opinion or conclusion of the regulatory body. Further, we do not undertake or warrant that the information represents the latest laws and regulations. For specific information, please consult the competent authority, law firms, or third-party certification/testing/consulting companies in the target country or region.

AliExpress.com will continue to monitor the changes in laws and related policies of countries worldwide, and adjust our platform rules accordingly.

  

Thank you for your support and attention.

**AliExpress**

- - -

全球速卖通关于禁售农药类产品的公告

发布日期：北京时间2023/7/11

**尊敬的速卖通商家：**

根据各国相关法律法规以及监管对农药类产品的管控要求，结合全球速卖通平台禁限售规则，因农药类产品具有高人身安全风险，速卖通特此强调**平台禁止商家销售农药类产品**。

【管控地区】
------

全球

【管控商品】
------

**农药类产品，指应用于大规模或专业农田、花园、果园等作物的除草剂、杀虫剂、杀虫喷雾等。**

【管控措施】
------

平台禁止商家在平台销售农药类产品，若商家存在有关上述产品的在途订单，请商家会员妥善处理，平台建议商家主动同买家联系取消订单。若无法取消，请自行承担相应风险。 平台发现商家店铺发布、销售相关产品，将按照全球速卖通禁限售规则，对发布的违规商品，执行2分删除。

平台提醒广大商家合规发品及合规交易，商家有责任遵守任何本国及销售目的国适用的产品合规法律，发布违规产品及信息的商家，平台将依照相关平台规则进行处罚。对恶意绕过规则、在任何场景（如沟通、直播等交互场景）发布违规信息、重复违规、被监管部门通告、被重要媒体曝光以及存在其他严重违规情节的会员，依据平台相关规则，平台将采取包括但不限于对相关产品及信息执行对应国家屏蔽、删除产品信息、扣分、屏蔽店铺、限制使用网站产品功能、冻结账号直至关闭账号的处罚。

  

**全球速卖通**

- - -

AliExpress Bans the Sale of angle grinder chain saw disc attachment to EU,UK,Turkey and Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

Release date: January 30, 2024 Beijing time

**Dear sellers**

AliExpress is always committed to maintaining an orderly marketplace in compliance with all local laws, regulations and providing consumers with safe and high-quality goods. In order to providing consumers with safe services, AliExpress prohibits the listings and sale of angle grinder chain saw disc attachment to EU, UK, Turkey and Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

\[Product Scope\]
-----------------

Angle grinder chain saw **attachments** are upgrade kits (generally consisting of a guide bar, a handle, and a chain) to transform an angle grinder into a chainsaw and a disc, which have a chain (like in a chainsaw) attached to them. These products enable a normal angle grinder to perform as a chainsaw.

Controlled example (including but not limited to the following type):

![](data:image/webp;base64,)

\[Controlled Areas\]
--------------------

EU, UK, Turkey and Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

\[Controlled measures\]
-----------------------

AliExpress prohibits the listings and sales of angle grinder chain saw disc attachment to EU, UK, Turkey and Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. If sellers have in-transit orders for the above-mentioned products, sellers are requested to handle them properly. The Platform recommends sellers to contact the buyer to cancel the order and prohibit related products from entering these markets.

Sellers shall list and sell products in accordance with applicable rules and abide by applicable laws and regulations of any country of origin and any country of destination. Where any seller is found to be listing products or releasing information in violation of the rules, AliExpress will delist or delete the related products or information and take action against the violator in accordance with relevant rules. For any seller that knowingly circumvents the rules, provides information about prohibited products in any scenario (e.g., chats, live-streaming), violates the rules repeatedly, is mentioned or suspected to be non-compliance by the media or regulator, receives negative publicity published by media, or commits any other serious violation, AliExpress will impose penalties, including but not limited to deleting product information, deducting points, blocking stores, restricting access to the website's product features, and freezing, suspend or even closing the account, in accordance with the platform's relevant rules.

\[References\]
--------------

1、European standards: EN 62841 and EN 60745

Directive 2006/42/EC

（[https://osha.europa.eu/en/legislation/directives/directive-2006-42-ec-of-the-european-parliament-and-of-the-council](https://osha.europa.eu/en/legislation/directives/directive-2006-42-ec-of-the-european-parliament-and-of-the-council)）

2、UK standards：

BS EN 60745-2-3:2011+A13:2015、EN 62841-2-3、UL 60745-2-3：2022、IEC 60745-2-3:2006+AMD1:2010+AMD2:2012 CSV

The Supply of Machinery (Safety) Regulations 2008-UK

（[https://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2008/1597/contents](https://www.legislation.gov.uk/uksi/2008/1597/contents)）

3、Turkey standards: Turkey Ministry of Trade Announcement（[https://www.trade.gov.tr/turkiye-and-eu/turkiye-and-the-eu](https://www.trade.gov.tr/turkiye-and-eu/turkiye-and-the-eu)）

4、Kingdom of Saudi Arabia standards: TR - Machinery Safety – Part 2 Mobile Machinery and Heavy Duty Equipment（https://www.saso.gov.sa/en/Laws-And-Regulations/Technical\_regulations/Documents/TR-Machinery-Safety-Part2-Mobile-Machinery-and-Heavy-Duty-Equipment.pdf）

Note: The above information shall not constitute any legal advice and shall not be deemed or represent the legal opinion or conclusion of the regulatory body. Further, we do not undertake or warrant that the information represents the latest laws and regulations. For specific information, please consult the competent authority, law firms, or third-party certification/testing/consulting companies in the target country or region.

AliExpress.com will continue to monitor the changes in laws and related policies of countries worldwide, and adjust our platform rules accordingly. Please contact our online customer service for any further queries.

Thank you for your support and attention.

AliExpress
